headline: Hoto’s PixelDrive screwdriver is down to $60, matching its best price
summary: Hoto's PixelDrive cordless screwdriver is now $59.99 on Amazon. This $20 discount matches its lowest price ever. Perfect for furniture assembly and electronic repairs.

headline: America’s greatest idea is still under threat
summary: America recently celebrated its 250th anniversary with global fanfare. Despite celebrations, the nation's core principles remain under threat. The article examines ongoing challenges to fundamental freedoms.

headline: Five questions for Dr. Rubin, who’s armed with a mic and a bowtie
summary: Meet Dr. Zachary Rubin, a truth-teller combating viral misinformation. He dedicates his expertise to informing the public effectively. An exclusive interview delves into his fight against falsehoods.

headline: Former Xbox studios Double Fine and Compulsion will keep games after going indie
summary: Microsoft is spinning off four Xbox studios, including Double Fine and Compulsion. Double Fine and Compulsion will retain rights to their game catalogs. This move is part of Xbox's broader restructuring efforts.

headline: Walmart Has a Decent 512GB Nintendo Switch 2 Memory Card Deal Despite the Price Hikes
summary: Walmart has a solid deal on a 512GB Nintendo Switch 2 memory card. This offer stands out despite recent price hikes in storage. More space is inevitable for future Switch 2 owners.

summary: Save 50% on the Lokithor J2250 Pro Cordless Car Jump Starter. Features safer, longer-lasting LiFePO4 batteries. These batteries outperform traditional lithium in cold conditions.

headline: How to Build a Better Steam Machine for (Slightly) Less
summary: Learn to build a superior Steam Machine for less money. Discover component choices that optimize performance and cost. Get tips for a powerful yet budget-friendly gaming setup.

headline: Why European backlash over Trump intervention won't worry Infantino
summary: European backlash over Trump's FIFA intervention won't deter Infantino. The Folarin Balogun controversy is unlikely to unseat the FIFA president. Infantino's decade-long tenure suggests resilience to criticism.

headline: World Cup fans react to Balogun's one-game ban suspension
summary: World Cup fans react to Folarin Balogun's one-game ban reversal. President Trump intervened with FIFA to lift the USA striker's suspension. Balogun is now cleared to play in today's match against Belgium.

headline: Prince Harry begins his UK visit with court verdict
summary: Prince Harry begins his UK visit focused on charity engagements. He awaits the verdict in his ongoing newspaper court battle. The visit blends official duties with significant personal legal news.

headline: Phone contract comparisons 'amounted to mis-selling' student loans, MPs say
summary: MPs accuse phone contract comparisons of mis-selling student loans. Students were not fully informed about retrospective changes to loan terms. A new report highlights concerns regarding student loan transparency.
